columns.name: AzureResourceId
columns.description: The Azure resource ID associated with the event.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: CvssSeverity
columns.description: CVSS (Common Vulnerability Scoring System) severity rating.

columns.name: DestCity
columns.description: City where the destination IP is geolocated.

columns.name: DestCountry
columns.description: Country where the destination IP is located.

columns.name: DestIP
columns.description: IP address of the destination.

columns.name: DestIsWellKnown
columns.description: Indicates if the destination is a known/trusted entity.

columns.name: DestLabel
columns.description: Label or tag assigned to the destination entity.

columns.name: DestPort
columns.description: Port number on the destination endpoint.

columns.name: DestThreatLevel
columns.description: Threat level associated with the destination IP.

columns.name: FlowCount
columns.description: Number of flows or sessions detected for this event.

columns.name: IllumioTenantId
columns.description: Tenant ID assigned by Illumio for multi-tenant environments.

columns.name: IllumioUrl
columns.description: URL to view the record or associated details in the Illumio console.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: Name
columns.description: The name or type of the insight or event.

columns.name: Port
columns.description: Source or service port involved in the communication.

columns.name: Proto
columns.description: Protocol used in the communication (e.g., TCP, UDP).

columns.name: ResourceInternalId
columns.description: Internal identifier for the monitored resource within Illumio.

columns.name: ResourceRegion
columns.description: The Azure region where the resource is deployed.

columns.name: ResourceSubId
columns.description: Azure subscription ID that contains the resource.

columns.name: ResourceTenantId
columns.description: Azure tenant ID to which the resource belongs.

columns.name: ResourceVnetId
columns.description: Identifier for the Virtual Network (VNet) associated with the resource.

columns.name: Service
columns.description: The name of the detected or used service (e.g., HTTP, SSH).

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: SrcCity
columns.description: City where the source IP is geolocated.

columns.name: SrcCountry
columns.description: Country where the source IP is located.

columns.name: SrcIP
columns.description: IP address of the source.

columns.name: SrcIsWellKnown
columns.description: Indicates if the source is a known/trusted entity.

columns.name: SrcLabel
columns.description: Label or tag assigned to the source entity.

columns.name: SrcPort
columns.description: Port number used by the source entity.

columns.name: SrcThreatLevel
columns.description: Threat level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) associated with the source IP.

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Current status of the insight (e.g., Active, Resolved).

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp when the record or event was logged.

columns.name: TotalReceivedBytes
columns.description: Total number of bytes received during the communication flow.

columns.name: TotalSentBytes
columns.description: Total number of bytes sent during the communication flow.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: UniqueId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the specific insight or event.

columns.name: VEScore
columns.description: Vulnerability exposure score indicating the risk level.
